projects.recommendation: Complete the proof of concept before committing to a full build; de-risk the approach.
projects.decision: APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS - Project approved to proceed to Phase 1, subject to: security audit sign-off by the CISO and legal review of data residency requirements. Budget of $380,000 confirmed.
action_items: Riya Joshi: Prepare technical architecture diagram for sign-off - Due: 09 August 2023

projects.recommendation: Approve the proposed architecture and proceed to Phase 1 with a fully staffed delivery team.
projects.decision: ON HOLD - Phase 1 temporarily placed on hold due to resource conflicts with the ERP programme. A resume decision will be revisited in 8 weeks once capacity is confirmed.
